column4: The highest point of the Nexus. A single chair faces outward into the void between worlds. Someone left a half-finished drink here.
A pale archway stands here, its surface like still water. Beyond it, ghostly lights drift upward. A sign reads: 'The Afterlife — For the Worthy and the Dead.'
column10:
,6|Gateway Chamber — Upper|nexus|The upper archway opens onto a staircase that climbs into starlight. Floating islands are visible in the distance. A sign reads: 'Ethereal Drift — Between the Stars.'|safe||||up:5001:door:none|,19|Nexus — Upper East|nexus|A balcony overlooks the central chamber from above. The view is dizzying.|safe|||||,,
,,12
column13: A large cork board dominates the wall here, covered in notices, bounties, and requests. Adventurers gather to read the latest postings.
column22: The northern archway pulses with golden light. Beyond it, you glimpse rolling green hills and castle spires. A sign reads: 'The Shattered Crown — Realm of Sword and Sorcery.'
column28:
,7|Gateway Chamber — Northeast|nexus|A shimmering portal shows scenes from different time periods flickering rapidly. A sign reads: 'Forgotten Epoch — History Unbound.'|safe||||northeast:6001:door:none|,15|The Observatory|nexus|A glass dome reveals the void between realms. Stars and distant worlds drift past. Telescopes of various designs point in every direction.|safe|||||,
,8
column31: A bustling marketplace fills this wide corridor. Merchants hawk wares from a dozen different worlds. The smell of exotic spices mixes with machine oil.
column40: The western archway glows with orange firelight. Explosions and gunfire echo faintly. A sign reads: 'Blood & Chrome — No Pain, No Gain.'
column47: The Nexus of Echoes — Central Chamber
column49: A vast circular chamber of polished obsidian. Six archways radiate outward, each shimmering with a different colored light. The ceiling is lost in darkness above, but faint stars seem to drift there.
column55: ,4|Gateway Chamber — East|nexus|The eastern archway drips with perpetual rain. Street lamps and saxophone music drift through. A sign reads: 'Midnight Rain — Where Shadows Have Secrets.'|safe||||east:3001:door:none|,9
column58: More market stalls line this corridor. A weapons dealer polishes a gleaming blade while a tech vendor demonstrates holographic displays.
column67: The ring of hammer on anvil fills this smoky room. A stocky smith works at a forge that burns with supernatural heat.
column76: A reinforced doorway leads into a large open space. The sounds of combat echo from within. A sign reads: 'All skill levels welcome. No killing.' A deep, perfectly round groove has been scored into the stone floor, as if something heavy and spherical rolled through here at tremendous speed. Chips of ancient masonry litter the path it carved.
column80: groove:The groove is unnervingly precise — perfectly hemispherical, about the size of a large marble. Whatever made this was moving fast and didn't slow down. Small fragments of stone are fused smooth along the edges, as if heated by friction. The trail leads deeper into the world.
column85: The southern archway crackles with blue-white electricity. Neon signs and holographic advertisements flicker beyond. A sign reads: 'Neon Grid — The Digital Frontier.'
column94: Soft blue light fills this domed room. Crystal formations pulse with restorative energy. A robed figure tends to the wounded.

column4: Crates and barrels are stacked against the walls. Most are labeled with destinations that no longer exist.
column13: A quiet corridor connecting the training areas to the lower levels. Torches flicker in iron sconces.
column22: A heavy iron grate in the floor has been pried open. A ladder descends into darkness. The smell of damp stone and worse things rises from below.
column31: A corridor lined with memorial plaques. Names of fallen heroes are etched in silver.
column40: A small meditation chamber. The walls absorb all sound. Perfect silence.

column4: Dust covers everything. Crates marked with symbols no one remembers. A rat watches you from atop a barrel.
column13: Below the main level. The walls here are older — rougher stone, no polish. Something was here before the Nexus was built.
column19:
,25|The Old Well|nexus|A stone well sits in the center of this room. The water is black and still. Sometimes it ripples when nothing has touched it.||||||,,

column22:
A cozy alcove beneath the Bulletin Board. Shelves line every wall, packed with useful gear, rare consumables, and mysterious trinkets — all available for Quest Points.

A cheerful shopkeeper stands behind a counter cluttered with oddities.

  Type QUEST SHOP to browse. Type QUEST BUY <number> to purchase.
